reviews.review_description: It's an awesome game but I just had a problem going on and I haven't been on for a while. There was an upgrade and I was a level 11 and now I'm like a level  1 . So all the fighting and all the money that I spent to get there is all gone now. This is very upsetting.

developer_response.body: Hello, we would appreciate it if you could send us detailed information about this issue via [contact@com2usroca.com]. Thank you.

reviews.review_description: I really love this game but I might stop playing soon because I’m fighting mostly bots and I only get to go up against a real person like once a month so the game is pointless because there’s not really a challenge, the bots are all the same difficulty so you win every time. If you’re interested in this game, definitely give it a try but don’t spend any money on it cause you won’t be fighting actual people very much

developer_response.body: Thank you for sharing your thoughts. To minimize pointless play caused by low matching frequency, we are already gradually widening the matchmaking criteria as wait times increase. It saddens me as well that you're facing so many bots because our community is still small. We will work harder to grow the player base and bring more real challengers to the game.

reviews.review_title: It could be a lot better with this added
reviews.review_description:
It needs a free but difficult way to get gems.

its a great game i wish i had given it more attention when i first installed.

as of late i find myself tired of personally engaging in fighting and this game was a nice change.

i hope this Review finds you well from djtaylor.

developer_response.body: Thank you for your feedback :)

reviews.review_description:
Solid game with endless potential!!  That being said I am not a fan of the way monetization is handled.  I understand Dev's need to be paid for the work they do but be fair and inviting when making them decisions.  
It's set up now where if you buy season pass the rewards from playing are 10x higher than a free player.  CoMon man that's too much!!  If it was 2x higher I would think, ok still not great but I get it.  If possible, monetization should be for cosmetics and other rewards that don't affect the game balancing.
I really do enjoy the game and hope the devs will reshuffle the monetization deck before full release or I am afraid this game will fail miserably.  And coming from someone that supports this industry, I own over 500 paid games and always want to see devs succeed.  I hope to see the changes needed made in the future and will be rooting for your success.

developer_response.body: Thank you for your valuable feedback. We understand your concerns about the monetization balance and have shared them with our development team for review. We’re committed to improving fairness and long-term player experience. We truly appreciate your support.

reviews.review_title: Needs a s**t ton of fixing
reviews.review_description:
No way to pick regional servers is a huge problem,  can't play with or add friends, can't match with friends, match making is rigged. Cost of moving up ranks for characters is very flawed. 
Don't get me wrong, it's a fun time passer and the mechanics are great, it's just hugely lacking a personal touch. Cant do anything for customizing as far as layout of characters, can't upgrade things without orbs that you never get. Just a lack of true player thinking in the design of the settings

developer_response.body: Thank you for your valuable feedback. We understand your concerns about matchmaking, progression balance, and limited customization. Your feedback has been shared with our development team and will be carefully reviewed for future improvements. We appreciate your support and will continue working to enhance the player experience.

reviews.review_title: See nothing but a black screen
reviews.review_description: When I open the game all I see is my hands and a black screen I tried to uninstall it and reinstall but same thing all I see is a black screen I love the game and would like this issue to be resolved

developer_response.body:
Hello,
this is the Heroes Battle Team.

If the issue persists even after the patch,
please try the following steps to resolve the problem.

For Android devices:
→ Delete obb > com.com2usroca.HB.obb
→ Completely uninstall the app and then reinstall it.

We apologize for the inconvenience, and we appreciate your cooperation.
If the issue continues or you have any further questions,
please feel free to contact us again.

Thank you.

reviews.review_description: I loved this game but it seems it has now been shutdown. I am not sure if its just me or if this is a major fault but it does not load in at all now. I Tried deleting it and restarting but nothing. Great pick up and play game while it lasted but just seems to me the devs have given up with it. Hope someone tells me I am wrong on this 😆.

developer_response.body:
Hello, this is the Heroes Battle team.

We would like to reassure you that we have not given up on the game, and we are continuously working to improve it so you can enjoy a better experience. We sincerely appreciate your patience and kindly ask for a little more time 🙏
Thank you once again for sharing your valuable feedback.

We are truly sorry to hear that the issue persisted even after you tried deleting and reinstalling the game.
To help us investigate this more accurately, we would greatly appreciate it if you could send us your platform/device information along with a screenshot (or video) of the error or loading screen to contact@comu2sroca.com
.

Thank you for your understanding and support.

reviews.review_description:
I have spent hours playing this! I was having so much fun playing the free version so I bought the season ticket and unlocked all the characters. I love that it requires constant calculation on everything in order to optimally use my resources to upgrade, the battles are of course with even more complex calculus happening real-time. Just called it a night with 72 winning streak so far. I only lose 1 game per every 50 to 100, why?

Some units are extremely OP and some are terrible, if you start out not knowing which ones are which, you will waste all your resources on testing.

The infuriating flaw is the quest to upgrade ice bomb to lv8, this is absolutely the worst unit and you make every newbie upgrade it and exhaust their resources and they almost always use this in game.

If this is not a sinister plan to force newbies to exhaust their resources on trash so they are forced to pay to get the resources they need to get the good units, I really don't know what it is.

I have darksword and played for a long time before trying this game so I basically know which units are good and which are meh, that really helps! 

Otherwise again if you have little knowledge you will waste a lot of resources trying the useless units.

developer_response.body:
Thank you for your valuable feedback.
We will work on improvements based on the points you shared.
Thank you again!

reviews.review_description: What even is this. It sucks dont even bother WASTING your time trying to play

developer_response.body:
We’re sorry to hear that you didn’t enjoy the game.
Your feedback is valuable to us, and we’re always working to improve the experience.
If you have any specific suggestions, we’d love to hear them. Thank you for trying the game.

reviews.review_description: I’ve uninstalled it and reinstalled never launches , all I ever see is a pair of guantlets with beams shooting out and then nothing happens I waited a while to still won’t run I’ve uninstalled,and reinstalled, update Aug 26 nothing has been done it still won't launch, will anyone ever do anything October 21 same issue no response

developer_response.body:
Fixed an issue where the game would not proceed after a black screen.
If the issue persists even after the patch:
→ For Android: Please delete obb > com.com2usroca.HB.obb and reinstall the app.
Adjustments made to in-game shop content.

plz...

reviews.review_description: I really liked the content of the game, it's kind of reminiscent of the Star Wars board game. Cool.

developer_response.body: You’re comparing us to Star Wars! We’re truly honored. We’ll do our best to make it an even better game.

reviews.review_description: I purchased $60 in game to play and because i loved this game only to now be stuck on a black screen and no way to vontact the devs to fix the bug or issue. Ive uninstalled and reinstalled numerous times to no avail. Id love to play, but game hasnt worked since i unlocked everything with cash purchase. I feel scammed.

developer_response.body: Thanks for reaching out—your report is noted, and the issue is under review. We understand how frustrating a blank screen can be, especially after your recent purchase. Your time and support are appreciated.

reviews.review_description: plsy every day and find it to be good quick fun, can be repetitive and sometimes the matches lopsided, but i do enjoy beating someone twice my rank sometimes. Overall a good short fun game just work on matchmaking and let me level up the hamsters more!

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much for your valuable feedback! 🙏
We’re truly delighted to hear that you enjoy playing every day.
We’ll work on improving the matchmaking system and hamster leveling as you suggested.
We’ll keep striving to make this a game where you can always enjoy short and fun moments. 🐹✨

reviews.review_description:
I love this game  I have always purchased the premium, but during playing last night the screen went black all I can see are my gloves, please fix!

Update, 
I cleared the data in storage on the heroes battle sword of darkness app, now everything seems to be working fine not stuck on black screen anymore, this is on the matter quest 3 VR system did not lose any of my progress

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much for your kind feedback. 🙂
We’re glad to hear that the issue has been resolved!
We’ll continue working hard to provide you with an even better service.

reviews.review_title: I see a lot of potential in this game
reviews.review_description: There's clear potential here, but it feels like the game's architectural design is still quite amateurish, a common issue I've seen in many VR RPGs. It's frustrating to see the game already offering in-game purchases when basic functionalities, such as creating a friend list or inviting a specific friend to play, are missing. I'm hesitant to invest my time and money until these core social features are in place.

developer_response.body: Thanks for taking the time to share your thoughts. We hear you on the importance of social features like friend lists and direct invites, and your feedback is now part of our ongoing review. We appreciate your candor and hope the core experience continues to show its potential as we evaluate next steps.

reviews.review_description: 1 on 1 fast paced matches. Wide variety of characters and endless strategies. Plus it’s free! you only pay if you want to upgrade your characters faster.

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much for your kind review!
We’ll keep working hard to deliver even better updates!
Please recommend our game to your friends so that we can continue improving it. 😢

reviews.review_description: Avoid this game.  No other words are needed.

developer_response.body:
Hello, we’re very sorry for the inconvenience you experienced while playing. 🙏
It’s disappointing that we couldn’t provide you with a better experience this time. We sincerely take your feedback to heart and will continue working hard to improve the game so it can be more satisfying in the future.

If you could share specific details about the issues or discomfort you encountered, we’d be able to address them more quickly—so please feel free to let us know anytime. Thank you.

reviews.review_title: A hidden gem you need to play
reviews.review_description:
Developer question...
Which game engine and model creation software was used to build this. Id love to clone your base game idea and redeign it in cyberpunk.

My review
 Discovered this and I was blown away. Using the maximum texture setting in the sidequest headset options or in the pc meta vr program this truly looks mind-blowing like a pc or console game. Even without upscaling textures playing in quest3 standard it looks great. The animation of the models also surprised me and there glowing uv wraps and I believe I got it free. I'd like to see different environments and model skins please especially when upgrading the main 3. Mixed reality is also a welcomed nice touch.  In addition I'm really now getting into the gameplay and mechanics of this nice little tabletop turn based type strategy game. I had played about 10 rounds with people when on a new fight a bloody great big dragon appeared next to me. It made me jump but boy it looks good in mixed reality. I havnt unlocked it yet but I'm returning to play most days to level up. I wouldn't mind bowling instead of point n shoot some lava rocks at some of the opposition. After all I am a god. 

Ideas for the devs
God's voice the new voice activated spell opens up the sky and lava rains on the board to damage the opposition and leave obstacles for the remaining game time for the characters to time consumingly traverse around. Also healing light voice spell can regenerate the main 3. 2 large pillars of  light punch through the ground each side of no1. There healing bright heath glow bathes them in regeneration for a few seconds

developer_response.body: Thanks for the kind words and curiosity about our toolchain—much appreciated! The project relies on Unreal, but we don’t share deeper pipeline details publicly. Your thoughts on new environments, model skins, and voice-activated spells have been noted for our continuing review. We’re glad you’re enjoying the experience and look forward to seeing you back at the tabletop.

reviews.review_description: This game could be good if only the Devs could try getting red some of the bugs where the game just stops. This game as stoped working

developer_response.body:
Oh, I see—so that was the issue!
We are currently preparing a patch, so please hang tight for a little while.
If the problem continues, we recommend completely deleting the folder where the game is installed and then reinstalling it. 🙂

reviews.review_description:
This game has great potential,  unfortunately for new players (like me) you will be matched with people WELL ABOVE your level and after a few matches of getting your a$$ kicked you will turn it off(like me). 
I'm now lvl 1000 and got matched with a lvl 9,000 who is ranked 2nd in gold league 🤔

developer_response.body: Thanks for letting us know how that felt. We understand those lopsided matchups can be discouraging, especially early on. Your note helps us keep an eye on how the ladder feels for new arrivals and longtime players alike. We appreciate you giving the game a try and sharing your perspective.

reviews.review_description: I love the idea of the game it's just missing a lot that could make it way better. Like your only able to carry 8 creatures or spells into battle could have been a deck that you can draw 4 at start and a different card is available next to fill the spot each time you play something that way it would lessen the chances of an opponent spamming certain spells. Also it's designed to where it's pay to win you practically have to at least get season pass to have a good chance they could just allow the avatars and spells to be free and sell the souls or level ups of them,but also allow them to gain experience and require souls to complete upgrades they could offer different arenas and tower looks for purchasing and just in general leave the core game as f2p and award loyalty of daily play to collect soul's like double amount every 5 consecutive login days

developer_response.body: Thanks for sharing these thoughtful ideas! We’ve noted your points about deck flexibility, progression balance, and reward structure. Insights like yours help guide our ongoing discussions on how the experience can feel both fair and engaging. We appreciate you taking the time to outline ways the game could grow, and we’re glad to have you in the community.

reviews.review_description: We need the option to quit matches when we're paired up with opponents that not only out rank us but are way further leveled and wouldn't matter their rank after a certain point. I get tired of having big to reset the game because I keep becoming a target for the same opponent that obviously has no life accept to play a video game. What happened to the proposed balance updates? We would also like to see the ability to challenge a AI at varying degrees. And somebody is cheating, because I just battled at a guy and all his characters were way lower level than mine, and somehow or another, he managed to pull off deploying troop after troop and the timing was impossible.

developer_response.body: Thanks for the detailed update. We understand how mismatched pairings, limited exit options, and unusual in-match behavior can feel frustrating. Your notes on a quick-quit feature, varied AI challenges, and the timing you observed have been recorded for ongoing review. Your perspective helps us keep an eye on balance and integrity—thanks for taking the time to share it.

reviews.review_description: Im conflicted. Money grabber, but its not terrible

developer_response.body:
Thank you for recognizing the potential in our game.

We understand your concerns about monetization. We are constantly trying to find the right balance so that the game remains enjoyable for everyone. We will keep working hard to improve the experience!

reviews.review_description: I been playing this game ik fr bout 3 mon, I hve invested alot of time and money in the game. Now I only see t h e title then a blank screen, I been trying to reach out to support. So far no luck it's been 2 days.

developer_response.body: Thanks for letting us know. We’ve noted your report and are already looking into the matter. Your time and support mean a lot to us.

reviews.review_description: I play often bought the battle pass some coins and diamonds. Love the gameplay don’t care about higher level players cuz they always have something cool that brings me back to want to learn. I sign in for deals often but it’s in heavy play on my headset! Mixed reality is awesome. Hopefully matching with friend coming soon???

developer_response.body: Thanks for the five-star energy! Great to hear you’re enjoying the mixed-reality battles and finding inspiration in the high-level strategies you encounter. Your note about friend matchmaking (and deals) is on our radar—feedback like yours helps steer our reviews. Appreciate the support and hope your next matches are just as fun!

reviews.review_description: At first, this game had a bug, so I reached out to the company, and they immediately fixed the problem, and now I play this daily.  Love this game and service

developer_response.body: Thanks for the kind words! We’re happy the quick adjustment helped and that the game’s now a daily favorite. Your support means a lot—have fun out there!

reviews.review_description: The game is great but repetitive until you start facing stronger people, then it becomes way more about strategy.

developer_response.body: Thanks for the encouraging note! It’s great to hear the deeper strategy shines through as your opponents get tougher. We’ve logged your thoughts on early-match pacing to inform our ongoing evaluations. Appreciate you taking the time to share—and enjoy your next sessions at the table!

reviews.review_description: Hope the crashing gets fixed

developer_response.body: Thank you for sharing. We would appreciate If you can describe the crash issue in further detail so that we can address it appropriately.

reviews.review_description: Playing the game is fun until someone who is ranked 10x higher then you is you opponent. Ie you have units lvl 5 and below while the person you face off against has lvl 11 units.  Or another way to put it ur rank shows 100 while the person you are matched against is 1100 like what the hell. Another pay up or you can win at all what a joke.

developer_response.body: Thank you for your feedback. We’re sorry to hear about your frustration with the matchmaking system. Ensuring fair and balanced matches is something we’re constantly striving to improve. Your input is valuable and helps us understand where adjustments are needed. We appreciate you taking the time to share your thoughts.

reviews.review_title: FUN!! A little unbalanced but FUN!!!
reviews.review_description: Is this game perfect? No. Is it FIVE stars worth of fun? HECK YEAH!!! This game is a lot of fun; reminds me of chess and D&D all in one. Cool to be able to naturally talk to your opponent and man when the balance is right it comes down to your strategy and wit to win. Mixed reality is so cool; this big gaming table in the middle of any room that you can walk around. It’s free, jump in and start having a blast.

developer_response.body: Thank you for the enthusiastic review! We’re glad the blend of strategy and mixed-reality play is resonating with you and that the social aspect adds to the experience. We also note your point on balance; perspectives like yours help us understand how different elements are landing in real matches. Your feedback is appreciated and contributes to our ongoing evaluation of the game. Enjoy your next sessions at the virtual table!

reviews.review_description:
I gave it a 5 star because the game has potential, it`s inspired from a mobile game (won`t say the name), but the idea is good. Needs a bit of polish, after all it`s a free game soo i can`t complain.
If you could have the chance to change the genre, like orcs vs undead, the game could go far.
Definitely buying a pass!

developer_response.body: Thanks for the five-star boost and the creative suggestion—much appreciated! We’re glad the concept clicks with you and it’s great to hear you’re considering the pass. Your ideas give us plenty to think about as we keep refining the experience. Have fun at the table, and thanks for playing!

reviews.review_description:
What I miss:

- Surrender Button
- Better Matchmaking
- Larger/Longer Battlepass
- Crafting 
- Bigger Battlefield with more specials
- Camera Configuration 

And do some marketing cause that’s a game many people would be interested in, trust me

developer_response.body: ¡Gracias por tus sugerencias tan detalladas! Nos alegra saber que disfrutas del juego y apreciamos tus comentarios. Tus ideas, como la incorporación de un botón de rendición, la mejora del sistema de emparejamiento, la ampliación del pase de batalla, la inclusión de crafting, ofrecer un campo de batalla más grande con elementos especiales adicionales y mejorar la configuración de la cámara, son muy valiosas para nosotros. Valoramos sinceramente tu aportación, ya que nos ayuda a considerar futuras mejoras, y nos alegra ver tu entusiasmo por el juego.

reviews.review_description: This game is absolutely pay to win. Match making is completely broken; you either play against a bot or a person whose level is far above yours. Skill is not required, you only need high level cards

developer_response.body: Thank you for sharing your feedback. We’re sorry to hear about your concerns with matchmaking and progression. Creating a fair and enjoyable experience for all players is important to us, and we appreciate your input as we work to address these issues. Thank you for taking the time to share your thoughts.

reviews.review_description: Although the game is awesome it's frustrating when we verse players with higher ranks ... Could you guys please share a coupon with me used the one that was offered... just to get a guy on his feet ...

developer_response.body:
Hi! Thank you for playing the game.
We appreciate your feedback and yes, the matchmaking is being tweaked to match people with similar levels more often. Also, we plan to provide more coupons along the way so please stick around!

reviews.review_description: When I first open up the game all I can see is my hands and the background music and a black screen other than that there's nothing to click on or anything nor can I do anything pls fix this or I'ma have to flag this game to meta

developer_response.body: Thank you for describing what you encountered. We recognize this issue and are currently investigating. We will notify once the issue has been resolved.

reviews.review_title: Has Potential, but missing some things
reviews.review_description:
The game’s foundation is solid.
Things it’s missing:
     1. Battle friends mode
     2. Tutorial of what the different units do

I’m not interested in playing random people, but the game has no way to invite my friends. This is something I would gladly pay money for like as an add-on, and I think a lot of other people would pay for this too. 

There’s a lot of cool looking units, but I have to pick up each unit to look at its stats. There should be some kind of sandbox mode where you can test the units against one another, and it puts their stats like on the back wall in large font.

developer_response.body: Thanks for the thoughtful suggestions—much appreciated! We’ve noted your interest in friend play and an easier way to explore unit abilities, and we’re adding your ideas to our ongoing review. It’s great to hear the core experience feels solid to you. Thanks for sharing and for being part of the community.

reviews.review_description:
This game is so fun. Use to play a similar game on the meta store but the devs gave up and now it’s dead. This game is similar to clash royale but with creatures! 
I think the game is super fun and the game is brand new so their is much more that will improved! I saw reviews about how you get ranked with people out of your skill level but so far that has not been the case, may have been fixed in the previous update. I’m playing on the quest 3 and it’s amazing but I do wish the quality was a tad better but like I said this game is super fun and free! I barely review anything. Give this game a go!

developer_response.body: Thanks for the encouragement and for pointing out areas that could be refined. We’ve noted your thoughts on visual fidelity and overall balance; feedback like yours guides our ongoing review. Glad you’re having fun, and we appreciate you taking the time to share.

reviews.review_description: Really nice amazing game

developer_response.body: Thank you for your review! We're glad that you like the game :D

reviews.review_description:
This game has real potential. The graphics are incredible, there is a good bit of diversity to the characters and battle tactics you can use, its fun and engaging... but the matching system sucks! 
Like so many others that have reviewed this game I really have to say: Devs please fix your matching system. Inevitably I end up playing games against hapless newbies that are far below my rank or complete predators who are rank 8000 - 9000! Almost never have I played a well matched game and Im about 20+ hours into the game (around rank 1500).
 I would honestly just rather have a solo mode where you play the bots. I have the most fun when I am matched against someone close to my own rank (about 90% of the time its a bot).
This game could be so good with a better ranking system, or at least a solo mode.

developer_response.body:
Thank you for your detailed review and constructive feedback! We’re glad you find the graphics, character variety, and gameplay engaging, but we understand your frustration with the matchmaking system. Finding balanced matches is essential for an enjoyable experience, and your insights highlight how we can improve.

We also appreciate your suggestion for a solo mode, and it’s helpful to know you enjoy those close, competitive matches. Thank you for your patience and support—we’ll keep working to make the game even better!

reviews.review_description: The only thing that is not very good is the match making it keeps putting me against gold players, good graphics, and buying the battle pass is a must to progress in the game and to get different pieces, you can easily get enough gems to get them.

developer_response.body: Thank you for your feedback! We’re glad you’re enjoying the graphics and finding value in the battle pass. We understand your concerns about matchmaking and will continue to look for ways to improve the experience for players at all levels. Your input helps us make the game better, so thank you for sharing, and we hope you keep having fun!

reviews.review_title: Very fun but also not F2P friendly
reviews.review_description:
I think this game is awesome. So far I am having a blast working my way up the leaderboards!

The gameplay and visuals are very good for a standalone Quest game. Strategy is key as this is a tabletop game with moving pieces, sort of in the style of Minion Masters but from a different angle. 

As for the game being free to play or pay to win, if you are willing to spend a few dollars, it will dramatically increase your strength out the gate and going forward. I personally don't mind spending $15 on a free game, because it supports the Devs and also gave me access to just about everything. 

The reason I gave this 4 stars, is the servers. I usually have a great session where I play for an hour and it's lag free. I would say roughly every 1 out of 4 sessions however, I get this crazy lag where the game just moves on its own and doesn't allow you to do anything, resulting in one person winning at random. I hope this gets fixed eventually.

developer_response.body:
Thank you for your thoughtful review! We’re thrilled to hear you’re enjoying the gameplay and visuals and having fun climbing the leaderboards. Your support means a lot, and we’re glad you find value in contributing to the game’s development.

We understand how frustrating server issues can be, and we’re continuously working to improve stability. Your feedback helps us identify areas to focus on, so thank you for bringing this to our attention. We hope you continue to enjoy your time in the game!

reviews.review_description: It is a lot of fun and I love how beautifully detailed the units are. If you pay it is easier to win, but I have not payed a penny and I am second at the platinum league. I have beat a lot of players that obviously payed. They give free crystals every other day (not much) but also a lot on the free version of the ticket pass and have already given 2 free codes (I am hoping for another for Christmas) I also got a great boost for posting a video. Then by playing you get orbs and gold that allow you to level up your units. There is some grinding needed.

developer_response.body: Thank you for your detailed review! We’re thrilled to hear you’re enjoying the game and appreciating the unit designs. It’s great to know you’re finding success and progressing in the game, even without spending. We’re glad the rewards and opportunities, like free crystals and codes, are adding to your experience. Thank you for your support and for sharing your thoughts—we hope you continue to enjoy the game!

reviews.review_description:
Great game. Easy to deploy and not challengong as far as controls. It lacks loot boxes skills or xp are not matched evenly where you face opponents on your level of xp.
It would also be great to purchase more creatures. 
Also a campaign or match up against the cpu. To improve your strategy. I like the game because its simple and tje creatures actions are interesting, but ita unfair if you are facing a opponent on 2689 xp and you are only on 200 xp. Makes the game in app purchases BS. Also you lose xp when you lose a battle making it harder to gain xp.
I boight a couple of creatures. Izabella and the black widow. These creatures helped, but there are player with extremely high xp dominating where you cant even get a deployment off.
Hopefully it will improve. For a free game its good, but has bugs

developer_response.body:
Thank you for your thoughtful feedback!
We’re glad you enjoy the simplicity and unique creature actions. We’ve recently upgraded the matchmaking system to address XP mismatches, ensuring battles are more balanced by pairing you with opponents closer to your level. This change is designed to create a fairer and more enjoyable experience for all players. Additionally, we’re actively considering your suggestions for a campaign mode, CPU matchups, and more creature options in future updates. We’re also reviewing the XP loss system to make progression more rewarding. Thank you for your support as we continue to improve the game!

reviews.review_description:
In this game, you start with a handful of units and abilities... enough to play

And there is a wall filled with new abilities and units that you can acquire...

BUT...

the units are exclusively locked behind a premium currency. 

you cannot unlock any new units by simply playing the game for free. 

I understand the need to earn money in F2P games... but EVERY SINGLE UNIT!?

...nah, 1 star, good bye

----
I see mention on discord of ways to earn crystals (premium currency) on their website, by pairing your twitter, and by spinning a wheel/completing challenges. 

well for a start.. Twitter is dead... you need to drop that requirement because nobody wants to give elon musk their email addresses, 

but also, why on earth would you not put the wheel and challenges in the game?

.... y'know... where your players actually are?

.... also, on the note of their website... it is hard to find because there is no mention of it, or the fact that we can earn crystals from it in the game

.... While writing this review I was also told there's a way to claim crystals in the in-game store... if that option was there, it has been removed

----

so other than the fact that there is no way to acquire new units without forking out your hard earned cash...

There is no way to invite friends to a duel... The tutorial tells you how to deploy units and not the rules of the game (I was 3 games in when i worked out the player with the least towers after a timer expires, loses)... Voice chat doesn't appear to work as in the 10 or so games i've played I've not heard a single voice... 

at this point, even if i wanted to spend cash on new units... the game is not worth my investment

----

Frankly, you guys need a new UX designer (one with a passion for gaming, not a passion for profit) because the user experience big-time sucks (for all the reasons i mentioned in this review)

developer_response.body:
Thanks for your feedback.
We are working on ways to improve the IAP structure and the matchmaking system. This is precisely why we chose for the early access track - to hear honest and helpful feedback from passionate users. We humbly accept your points, and will work harder to make the game better! Thanks.

reviews.review_description:
I've really enjoyed this game so far! It is a little pay to win, but it's also in early access and is free to play. Support the devs or suck it up. May not be for everyone, but I don't understand why everyone has been hating on this game for that reason. The gameplay is fun, and as an early adopter, I like feeling like my loyalty is rewarded. 

I say give it a shot, and judge for yourself. The devs seem very active, and understand the game isn't perfect yet. They seem committed to keeping the game as balanced as an RTS can be. Maybe a casual mode would be helpful for people who want less competition. Other than that, I am excited to see how this game progresses!

developer_response.body:
Thank you for your valuable feedback!
Yes, we are indeed continuously working to improve the game, including its monetization structure, to make the experience more enjoyable for all players. Recently, we updated the in-game purchase (IAP) structure to offer non-paying users guaranteed premium currency and frequent events with more rewards. We are also working on the matchmaking system to make each battle as fun as it can be! So, please stay tuned!

reviews.review_description:
The most egregious p2w game I have ever seen on the quest. You can pay irl money to upgrade your minions to be stronger than your opponent.

Each minion can be upgraded 20 times giving them upgraded stats. Someone can have the same minion as you with stats ridiculously higher, it becomes an insta lost. 

Unless you plan on spending ££££ on this game it is not worth installing.

developer_response.body: Thank you for your valuable feedback. We sincerely appreciate your insights into the game’s quality and structure, and we remain dedicated to continuously enhancing the experience for all players. Recently, we have improved the in-game purchase (IAP) structure to allow non-paying users to receive a guaranteed amount of premium currency, along with frequent events where players can earn even more simply by participating. While in-game purchases are available, the game remains free to enjoy for most players. We will continue listening closely to the community and thoughtfully addressing your concerns. Thank you once again for your support.

reviews.review_description: Why even make this?

developer_response.body: Thanks for playing. We're sorry that you didn't like it. We will try to make it better.

reviews.review_description:
Nice game. Great models. Fun.

I have found a typo. One of your models is called 'Gaurdian' I think it should be 'Guardian'.

Keep up the good work. Great start!

developer_response.body: Thank you for that! We will surely get that fixed.

reviews.review_title: One star because I have too…
reviews.review_description: It’s a shame that this game is the most blatent Pay to win game I have ever seen.  It could have been great. I cannot wait for the day when meta allows us to delete games in our not installed list.

developer_response.body:
Hi Wareix,
We are sorry that the game did not meet your expectations! We nevertheless appreciate your honest opinion and will take it to our heart as we try to make the experience better and more enjoyable. 

While we repect your opinion, we do not agree with your characterization of the game that it is a blatent copy of an existing title, which in fact, we very much love. The game's genre may seem similar, like a tabletop or an FPS shooter may seem, but that does not make every other tabletop or FPS  a copy of previous titles. 

That said, we are all ears when it comes to the actual aspects of our game, which we will continuously work to make it better as much as possible. Thank you!

reviews.review_description: played one match found it fun :) appears to have a good roster of units

developer_response.body: Thank you! We look forward to your feedback and making the game better and more enjoyable!

reviews.review_description: Started playing this and it reminds me of chess. Love this game and climbing up the leader board.. be on the lookout for moorerhouse i might just be your next opponent. 😉

developer_response.body: Thanks for the enthusiasm—your competitive spirit stands out! We appreciate your engagement and look forward to seeing your name on the leaderboard.

reviews.review_description:
I've been looking for this game or
 one like this and the graphics are marvelous for vr small scale battle love it add more units and a ranking system but for free makes me cry this is at least 5-10$ usd

developer_response.body: We're thrilled that you’re enjoying the game and its marvelous graphics in VR. Your suggestions for adding more units and a ranking system are really appreciated and help us understand what players value. Thanks for your support and for sharing your thoughts with us!

reviews.review_description: ok thanks i love when game devs lessen

developer_response.body:
Thank you for your feedback!
For now, we don't have an option for private matches or matching with friends. These are obviously some of the things we can bring to the game during its early access stage. As such, we will continue to listen and see what we can do going forward. Thank you!

reviews.review_description: This is a fun table top. It is pay to win. But the free option works just  fine. There is a leveling aspect, not sure what for because your rank determines who you play against. If your low rank you will have to play the pay to wins so they can rank up. You have daily quest but they are kinda pointless you hit level 30 long before you take 350 towers so exp is useless. After a while I feel you just log in to grab the daily free item from the store, maybe play a round or two and log out. Sign up to the discord and watch for giveaways.

developer_response.body: Thank you for sharing your thoughts and for enjoying the tabletop gameplay. We appreciate your feedback regarding the progression system and the matchmaking dynamics, and we're always listening to how players experience the game. Your insights are valuable as we continue to evaluate and refine the overall experience. Thank you for your support and for being a part of our community!

reviews.review_description: Great game would love to see more characters added!

developer_response.body: Thank you for your positive review! We're glad you're enjoying the game and appreciate your suggestion about adding more characters. Your feedback is really valuable as we continue to enhance the experience.

reviews.review_title: Get that this is pay to play but...
reviews.review_description:
I've seen you mention that "you can enjoy and progress in the game without spending money" but based upon your matching system that's simply not true. The matching system does not pit you against someone of similar strength as you. It's 100% random and it's simply not fun getting crushed by people who are clearly stronger than you. Conversely, I wouldn't have fun if I were constantly being pitted against players significantly weaker than I am. I think the best improvement you could make would be to make opponents searchable so you could play against your friends. That way you can grow in strength together as well as have fun with people you know. I don't mind spending a little money on an app I got for free but not if it's going to remain a constant money pit just to be able to stay competitive. I believe by doing nothing more than allowing players to match themselves against people on their friends list, you'd be giving people the best of both worlds. I wouldn't allow people to match against people that aren't friends because that would lead to the idiots who base their whole self worth on a game to just pick matches they can easily win OR if you're going to allow people who don't know each other to match, you should allow the other person to choose whether or not they want to proceed with the match once they've been allowed to see the strength of the player challenging them. 

The game has great graphics, has a lot of potential and is very reminiscent of clash royale as far as the gameplay and mechanics. The matching system needs to be tweaked and add the ability to match yourself against friends and I don't think it would take long for this to become a top 10 game on Meta.

Fix the matching system and then I would give it 5 stars. Leaving it like it is? Just 4 stars.

developer_response.body:
Thank you for your valuable feedback!
We’ve received many comments regarding the matchmaking system, and we’ve worked hard to address this issue. To create a more balanced experience, we’ve implemented a new set of matching rules designed to minimize extreme player level disparities. We hope this makes your gameplay experience more enjoyable.!

reviews.review_description: I wanted to like this and the graphics are excellent.  The VR movements and actions are good...its easy to pick up your pieces.  After playing about a twenty games a few things were clear.  1.  I would need to play a hundred games...hundreds of games? to get a single new character.  2. The same board/map was used in every match.  3. Matching making was really poor.  So heavy pay to win and just not fun.  Deleted.

developer_response.body:
Thank you for sharing your honest feedback.

We’re glad to hear you enjoyed the graphics and VR mechanics, but we understand your concerns about progression, variety, and matchmaking. Improving these elements is a priority for us as we want to make the game rewarding and enjoyable for players of all play styles. We're actively exploring ways to offer a more balanced matchmaking experience and enhance the variety in maps to keep each battle fresh and exciting.

Thank you for giving our game a try and for providing valuable insights—your input helps us make meaningful improvements.

reviews.review_title: Fun game! How do I add friends?
reviews.review_description: How do I add friends so we can play together?

developer_response.body:
Thank you for your feedback!
For now, we do not provide an option for private matches or matching with friends. These are obviously some of the things we are considering as we make improvements to the game during its early access process. As such, we will continue to listen and see what we can do going forward. Thank you!

reviews.review_description: Heroes Battle offers the thrill of strategy with simple controls. It's a fast-paced, real-time tabletop strategy game where every decision counts.

developer_response.body:
Thank you for the review! 
We are happy that you like it!

reviews.review_description: I love this  the graphics the gameplay all first class. The only bad thing is it’s pay to win. Players with a lot of money are impossible to beat. I can’t see a way of levelling up without paying.

developer_response.body:
Thank you for your valuable feedback!
We’re committed to making the game better for everyone, including improvements to the monetization structure. Recently, we revamped the in-game purchase (IAP) system to ensure non-paying players receive guaranteed premium currency and enjoy frequent events with increased rewards. We're also refining the matchmaking system to make every battle as engaging as possible. Stay tuned for more updates!
